name: Red Lobster Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder (or more if you prefer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the baking mix, milk, and cheese until a soft dough forms.
2. Beat vigorously for 30 seconds.
3. Drop the dough by spoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes.
5. Mix the butter and garlic together.
6. Brush over warm biscuits before removing them from the oven.
